testcase.name: M-1 Network Performance Insight with Throttling
testcase.system-out:
--- Performance Metrics (UNDER THROTTLING) --- ┌─────────┬────────────────────┐ │ (index) │ Values │ ├─────────┼────────────────────┤ │ dns │ [33m3.0999999046325684[39m │ │ tcp │ [33m145.40000009536743[39m │ │ ssl │ [33m75.70000004768372[39m │ │ ttfb │ [33m689.3999999761581[39m │ │ total │ [33m0[39m │ └─────────┴────────────────────┘ Resource: https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/getconfig/ab... TTFB: 302.62ms
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\monitoring-monitoring-M-1--dbae8-nce-Insight-with-Throttling-monitoring\video.webm]]
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\monitoring-monitoring-M-1--dbae8-nce-Insight-with-Throttling-monitoring\trace.zip]]

testcase.name: E2E-1: Register User @critical @stable

property.name: Test Data
property.value: Name: user9719 | Email: qa_20260318T113349825Z_626@example.com | Password: Test1234

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:7:5 › E2E-1: Register User @critical @stable › Sign up new user
Error: expect(locator).toBeHidden() failed
Locator: locator('button[data-qa="create-account"]') Expected: hidden Received: visible Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toBeHidden" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('button[data-qa="create-account"]') 9 × locator resolved to <button type="submit" class="btn btn-default" data-qa="create-account">Create Account</button> - unexpected value "visible"
at ..\pages\signupPage.ts:107
105 | await this.mobileNumberInput.fill(user.mobileNumber); 106 | await this.createAccountButton.click(); > 107 | await expect(this.createAccountButton).toBeHidden(); | ^ 108 | 109 | } 110 | at SignupPage.fillForm (C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\pages\signupPage.ts:107:44) at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:19:5 at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\e2e\Account_create.spec.ts:17:3

testcase.name: BUG-4: Payment field is blocked by overlay on large screens
C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug

property.name: fail
property.value: BUG-###: Race condition returns 200 OK

failure.message: Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:7:5 C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › monitoring\Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:7:5 › C-1 Concurrency Trap: Catching the 200 OK bug
Test timeout of 30000ms exceeded.
Error: 5 users failed to register due to race condition.
36 | const failed = results.filter(r => r.status === 'rejected'); 37 | if (failed.length > 0) { > 38 | throw new Error(`${failed.length} users failed to register due to race condition.`); | ^ 39 | } 40 | }); 41 | at C:\study\pw-e2e-automationexercise\tests\monitoring\Account_create_concurrency.spec.ts:38:15
